name: Rocks # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs to the mixture and beat thoroughly until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the cake flour, baking powder, baking soda, ground cinnamon, chopped nuts, raisins or dates, ground cloves, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the shortening mixture, alternating with sour milk, mixing gently after each addition until just combined.
5. Fold in the chopped figs (or dates) until evenly distributed throughout the batter.
6. Using a spoon or cookie scoop, drop rounded teaspoonfuls of the batter onto a greased baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for about 12 minutes, or until lightly golden and set.
8. Remove from the oven and allow to cool on a wire rack before serving.
